prestazioni: RB26DETT engine: Full forged internals with Tomei 87mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 2.8L stroker crankshaft for a 2.8L displacement. Paired with a Tomei 272°/272° camshaft set (11.5mm lift) and Tomei adjustable cam gears for optimized valve timing.

Turbocharger upgrade: Twin Garrett GT2860-5 ball-bearing turbos (0.86 A/R, 60 trim) with custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipes, HKS SSQV blow-off valves, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (targeting 1.4 bar/20 psi). Intercooled with a custom front-mount intercooler kit from Trust/GReddy (3.5-inch core, 600hp capacity).

Drivetrain & handling: OS Giken 2.2L limited-slip differential with 1.5-way clutch-type LSD, Nismo 5-speed close-ratio transmission gears (1st: 2.785, 2nd: 1.922, 3rd: 1.436, 4th: 1.115, 5th: 0.856), and a N1-spec 4.300 final drive ratio. Suspension features Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear springs) with Cusco pillowball upper mounts and Nismo front/rear adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 20mm rear).
estetica: Bodywork: Rocket Bunny V1 R32 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Matte Gunmetal wrap. Rear wing is a Voltex Type-3 GT wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height) with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle mounts.

Wheels & brakes: Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 (front) and 18x11 +20 (rear) wheels with Yokohama Advan A052 275/35/18 (front) and 295/30/18 (rear) tires. Braking system includes Endless 6-pot front/4-pot rear calipers with 356mm (front) and 330mm (rear) two-piece rotors, paired with Endless CC-RG brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.

Interior & details: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, Nismo R32 GT-R V-Spec II steering wheel (MOMO quick-release hub), and a Defi Advance BF gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, water temp, exhaust gas temp, and fuel pressure). Engine bay features a custom carbon fiber strut brace from C-West and a full titanium bolt kit from ARP (head studs, main studs, and flywheel bolts).
